description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 5. Completion markers and completed-observation lifecycle**.

Goal: once explicit lifecycle semantics exist, make sure `currentTask` and reflected observations move completed work out of the active block while still preserving completed outcomes and distinguishing abandoned/superseded work.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/agents.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`

Worker notes:
- this is primarily about update semantics, not just phrasing
- keep `buildObservationContext()` and `/om` reporting coherent with the new lifecycle behavior
- avoid leaving stale completed items in the active task block

Validation should cover observe → reflect → inject flow, not just isolated prompt text.
title: Keep current-task and reflection state in sync with completion transitions
